headline: Barcelona target £54m Chelsea star to sign instead of Marcus Rashford
snippet: Barcelona have the option to sign Marcus Rashford for €30m (£26.3m) at the end of the season (Getty) Barcelona are considering a move for Chelsea winger Pedro Neto instead of signing Marcus Rashford f
full_text: Barcelona have the option to sign Marcus Rashford for €30m (£26.3m) at the end of the season (Getty) Barcelona are considering a move for Chelsea winger Pedro Neto instead of signing Marcus Rashford from Manchester United, according to reports. Rashford joined Barcelona on loan last summer and has impressed this season with 10 goals and 13 assists so far. Barcelona have the option to sign the 28-year-old for €30 million (£26.3m) at the end of the season as part of their loan agreement with United. However, Mundo Deportivo reports that Rashford is ‘well-positioned’ to join Barcelona on a permanent basis but the Spanish champions are still considering alternatives. The report claims that Neto is one of the attacking players on Barcelona’s radar after receiving ‘very positive technical reports’ from the club’s scouting department.
